settings.title: About TechCore PH
settings.text: TechCore PH helps Filipino customers choose performance laptops, PC components, gaming accessories, and workstation equipment with clear specs, practical advice, and Philippine-ready delivery and payment options.

settings.title: Built around real buying decisions
settings.text: Every product page highlights specs, warranty details, stock status, and compatibility notes so customers can compare quickly.

settings.title: Designed for Philippine buyers
settings.text: The store supports local payment options, Metro Manila delivery, provincial shipping, pickup messaging, and technical assistance.

settings.title: Premium tech retail for work, gaming, and creativity
settings.intro: Modern hardware, clear specs, and guidance for laptops, parts, and custom PC builds.
